final:
module sram_cell (  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out,  
    input wire RE,  
    input wire WE,  
    input wire CLK  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (RE) begin data_out <= memory ; end
  end  
endmodule
